steps.assistant_text: gl_func_00072230 = libultra __osPfsRWInode (io/contpfs.c) -- seventh ido53-carve recovery, FIRST TRY from verbatim libreultra source at IDO 5.3 -O1 (was a 42.6% NM wrap). Reads/writes the 8-page inode table with checksum verify and mirror-table fallback. Literals confirmed vs 2.0I os.h: PFS_WRITE=1, PFS_READ=0, PFS_ERR_INCONSISTENT=3, PFS_ONE_PAGE=8. All callees (SelectBank/Sumcalc/RamRead/RamWrite) = gl_func_00000000 runtime-patch placeholders. The pfs suite continues beyond contpfs.c -- next functions in the segment are likely pfs*.c files at the same flags.

metadata.verification: Byte-exact 200/200 words vs target asm AND vs baserom raw ROM bytes (incl. placeholder jal fields); report.json fuzzy=100.0; post2b head and downstream byte-verified after the carve extension.
